/CAL:PRC EVALUATION STATUS/X:PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING,/X:VICTIM TORI ANN POTTS IS VOIR DIRED BY THE PEOPLE,/3000ADV/3000ADM/X:PAROLEE ADMITS VIOLATION #2,/3000REIN/PAJ:34 DAYS/X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 34 DAYS, NO TIME LOST,/4019HALF/X:TREATMENT TO BE DETERMINED AND SUPERVISED BY PAROLE,/SA5:TORI ANN POTTS/SAORD/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONSGIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/X:THEPEOPLE'S MOTION TO DISMISS THE REMAINING VIOLATIONS IS GRANTED,/

/CAL:PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/X:PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING VIA ZOOM,/X:PAROLEE IS REFERRED TO CHARLES BROWN FOR PRC EVALUATION,/X:TODAY'S PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING IS VACATED,/CONTD:PRC EVALUATION STATUS ON 02-08-22//CONTD:POSSIBLE DISPO ON 02-10-22/

/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X:MICHAEL MENESINI APPEARING VIA ZOOM,/X: PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR AND PAROLE CASE MANAGER CHARLES BROWN ARE PRESENT VIA ZOOM,/PDP/WIAPTR/X: PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TO THE ALLEGATIONS,/X:DEFENSE ORAL MOTION FOR RELEASE IS DENIED/NB/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/   /CONTD: PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/
/CAL:PRC EVALUATION STATUS /X:PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING VIA ZOOM,/CONT/
/CAL:PAROLE PHC/NP/X:PAROLEE IS 4011,5 TODAY,/X:HEARING DATE OF 02-01-22IS CONFIRMED,/
